case_title: AMERICAN FIDELITY ASSURANCE COMPANY VS. COLLEEN MCGINN ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO CONTINUE TRIAL/ TO MAY 6, 2019 (TRANSACTION ID # 62977789) FILED BY AMERICAN FIDELITY ASSURANCE COMPANY

MASTER SHORT CAUSE CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-19-2019 -- APPEARANCE BY DENNIS RHODES, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF AMERICAN FIDELITY ASSURANCE COMPANY -- THE COURT GRANTED THE PARTIES' EX PARTE APPLICATION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED TO MAY-06-2019 AT 9:30 AM IN 206. calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: GARRET L. WONG; Clerk: Maria Olopernes; Proceedings not reported. (610)
